name: Kartaeuserkloesse (Carthusian Dumplings)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shape the rolls into dumplings by rubbing the crust on all sides.
2. Put these dumplings into a mixture of egg yolk, milk, lemon peel, and sugar.
3. Allow them to absorb the liquid thoroughly.
4. Gently squeeze out excess liquid by hand.
5. Whisk together egg white and water, then dip the dumplings in this mixture.
6. Roll the dumplings in breadcrumbs.
7. Deep fry in fat until golden brown.
8. Finally, roll in a mixture of sugar and cinnamon.
Serves 4. [Note: I would probably use 2 teaspoons of vanilla sugar. K.B.]
